2604.25806.title: MAIC-UI: Making Interactive Courseware with Generative UI
2604.25806.paper_summary: Creating interactive STEM courseware traditionally requires HTML/CSS/JavaScript expertise, leaving barriers for educators. While generative AI can produce HTML codes, existing tools generate static presentations rather than interactive simulations, struggle with long documents, and lack pedagogical accuracy mechanisms. Furthermore, full regeneration for modifications requires 200--600 seconds, disrupting creative flow. We present MAIC-UI, a zero-code authoring system that enables educators to create and rapidly edit interactive courseware from textbooks, PPTs, and PDFs. MAIC-UI employs: (1) structured knowledge analysis with multi-modal understanding to ensure pedagogical rigor; (2) a two-stage generate-verify-optimize pipeline separating content alignment from visual refinement; and (3) Click-to-Locate editing with Unified Diff-based incremental generation achieving sub-10-second iteration cycles. A controlled lab study with 40 participants shows MAIC-UI reduces editing iterations (4.9 vs. 7.0) and significantly improves learnability and controllability compared to direct Text-to-HTML generation. A three-month classroom deployment with 53 high school students demonstrates that MAIC-UI fosters learning agency and reduces outcome disparities -- the pilot class achieved 9.21-point gains in STEM subjects compared to -2.32 points in control classes. Our code is available at https://github.com/THU-MAIC/MAIC-UI.
2604.25806.paper_summary_zh: 創建互動式 STEM 課程材料傳統上需要 HTML/CSS/JavaScript 專業知識，這對教育工作者造成了障礙。雖然生成式 AI 可以產生 HTML 代碼，但現有工具生成的是靜態演示，而不是互動模擬，並且在處理長文檔時表現不佳，缺乏教學準確性機制。此外，對於修改的完全重生成需要 200--600 秒，這會干擾創意流程。我們提出了 MAIC-UI，一個零代碼的創作系統，使教育工作者能夠從教科書、PPT 和 PDF 中創建和快速編輯互動課程材料。MAIC-UI 採用了：（1）結構化知識分析與多模態理解，以確保教學的嚴謹性；（2）一個兩階段的生成-驗證-優化流程，將內容對齊與視覺精煉分開；以及（3）基於統一差異的 Click-to-Locate 編輯，實現了小於 10 秒的迭代周期。一項包含 40 名參與者的控制實驗室研究顯示，MAIC-UI 減少了編輯迭代次數（4.9 次對 7.0 次），並顯著提高了可學習性和可控性，與直接的文本轉 HTML 生成相比。與 53 名高中生進行的三個月課堂部署顯示，MAIC-UI 促進了學習主動性並減少了結果差異——試點班在 STEM 科目上取得了 9.21 分的增長，而對照班則為 -2.32 分。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/THU-MAIC/MAIC-UI 獲得。
2604.25806.author: Shangqing Tu et.al.
2604.25806.authors: Shangqing Tu, Yanjia Li, Keyu Chen, Sichen Zhang, Jifan Yu, Daniel Zhang-Li, Lei Hou, Juanzi Li, Yu Zhang, Huiqin Liu
